signals.lore: ansem screenshot with the token + 40% airdrop to holders sparked the move, community now flooding moonshot and fomo votes for listings

references.relevance: explains the Ansem catalyst behind the pump
references.text: $manlet 7.25m ... Ansem just sent a screenshot that included the Manlet token

references.relevance: project account activity tied to Ansem narrative
references.text: post with image, 258 likes

references.relevance: confirms airdrop and Ansem connection
references.text: @blknoiz06 holds 40% supply ... ansem ... solana manlet

signals.lore: barmstrong association in early posts as first coin launch. project posting 5m target with 18 likes. mostly vote spam and thin liq moves since

references.relevance: project self-hype post with engagement
references.text: Brian 5M! Let’s moon it!

references.relevance: ties pump to brian armstrong launch narrative
references.text: Send it . First coin launch by @brian_armstrong just 150k $brian

references.relevance: early mention of armstrong deployment
references.text: $BRIAN "The Bald Eagle" was deployed by @barmstrong (Brian Armstrong)

signals.lore: base trenches framing $jesse as the chain's $ansem equivalent with direct jessepollak tie in, fresh posts comparing it to $cz on bnb pushing the tape. no update from the man himself

references.relevance: direct comparison driving the narrative
references.text: Sol have $ANSEM BNB have $CZ Base have $JESSE by @jessepollak

references.relevance: notes the move and volume in context of the analogy
references.text: looks like base trenches are trying to give us their own runner ... now $JESSE is starting to put up some interesting numbers

references.relevance: ties pump to base connection and airdrop beta angle
references.text: $JESSE is pumping, and it's not random. The direct link to @base is the real catalyst here

signals.lore: kol posts from @vegasnipes and @biostone_chad on the brian armstrong wallet angle plus base runner vibes. @whaleclank launched the bald bull play on clanker. no project handle chatter

references.relevance: launch post tying to the token move
references.text: $BRIAN IS GOING LIVE NOW ON @clanker_world launch my token on base Name: The Bald Bull Ticker: BRIAN And lock 10% supply for 7 days

references.relevance: kol call on the pump and volume
references.text: base might've found another runner $BRIAN has already done over 6,000% since launch... chart filling with big names

references.relevance: wallet narrative driving attention
references.text: 80% supply for @brian_armstrong -> Will this get BRIAN's attention? MC 2.5M $BRIAN #Base

references.relevance: trader adding on the dip
references.text: the base trenches been needing something everyone would fw... i’m getting that vibe from $BRIAN added some more in this dip

signals.lore: crashiusclay69 called the base version the real tribute coin in a big post today. low chatter but bids stacking on the contract.

references.relevance: main catalyst post acknowledging the token and driving attention
references.text: the real tribute coin was made on Base... OG holders from Base

references.relevance: direct shill with matching contract link
references.text: $CRASH needs one more push

phrases: real tribute coin was made on Base

signals.lore: levirietveld posted white bull ath call with video today. an sem successor narra pulling 24k pct gains and 8m+ vol on big wallet flow. still early or cooked

references.relevance: founder conviction post with high engagement driving hype
references.text: Sooo... $LEVI The White Bull Is About To Smash A New ALL TIME HIGH

references.relevance: kol post with exact vol and gain numbers on the move
references.text: $LEVI has been an absolute monster over 24,000% in less than 24 hours, more than $8.8M in volume

references.relevance: follow up post reinforcing momentum
references.text: Keep your eyes on the prize solana:6baGyq4HLbUn93MQUGFqBktpXP8BRjpoxSsAap4ppump is just getting started.

signals.lore: levirietveld posted white bull up 1700% today with airdrops coming soon. 12m mc volume holding on the move.

references.relevance: project dev post directly tied to the gains and forward catalyst
references.text: So The White Bull $LEVI is just casually up 1,707.46% today 😂 We're going so much higher, airdrops coming soon.

signals.lore: sapijiju dev posting about claiming pump fees and rotating into pump. first founder move like this. 65% supply in wallet.

references.relevance: direct claim from self-identified dev explaining the fee rotation driving the move
references.text: I'm the Sapijiju dev (10M ATH) Sapijiju is running because he's claiming the fees of the coin at 5.3M, and flywheeling it into PUMP

references.relevance: detailed breakdown of the founder activity and supply concentration behind the pump
references.text: Sapijiju is the co-founder of Pump... collected the token's fees and exchanged them for PUMP. This is the first time a Pump founder has used fees in this way... wallet holds 65% of the supply

signals.lore: cupsey team dropped the 'building one' update as pumpfun mascot with ip secured, happypillco plushies, space x billboard and kol sends. stitchdegen posted full breakdown after. real brand angle holding?

references.relevance: core team post listing achievements that sparked chatter and pump
references.text: While everyone else is chasing narratives, we’re building one. So far: IP secured, @Pumpfun mascot, ... Billboard next to SpaceX HQ, Official plushy creator onboard - @HappyPillco

references.relevance: KOL breakdown amplifying the narrative post pump
references.text: After that massive god candle, $CUPSEY completely took over Crypto Twitter ... full breakdown

phrases: while everyone else is chasing narratives we’re building one

signals.lore: moonshot and fomo listing vote pushes pulling activity today, dev offering dex boost for community growth

references.relevance: shows active listing vote campaign tied to recent price action
references.text: yo $CUPSEY is about to get listed on moonshot, theyre only missing 144 votes left

references.relevance: another listing vote push from same timeframe
references.text: I just voted YES for $CUPSEY to get listed on FOMO!

references.relevance: dev incentive directly linked to community growth and potential pump catalyst
references.text: $Cupsey D3v mentioned he*ll pay for a x30 boost dex after 9 new members in coin community

phrases: pay for a x30 boost dex

signals.lore: b20 live on base today, rwagmi as first token with dexscreener verification posted by the team, site slammed with 500k requests in a minute

references.relevance: team confirming dexscreener verification amid the move
references.text: Knowing that people like to see Dexscreener verification. You will see the official RWAGMI verified on Dexscreener here soon.

references.relevance: direct evidence of traffic spike tied to launch
references.text: Our website https://rwagmi.com/ might be struggling right now. To give you the numbers we got over 500K requests to the server in a minute.

references.relevance: project announcement of b20 live coinciding with the pump
references.text: B20 is live on Base. So is $RWAGMI. The official CA: 0xb200000000000000000000Bf0548AB2ebD00bA5e
